title: fix: wan DashScope only, remove airforce path
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Wan takes the express lane
gist.blurb: We've updated the Wan video model to route directly to premium providers. No more traffic jams, just smooth video generation.
gist.summary: Updated Wan video model routing to bypass rate-limited endpoints and use DashScope exclusively.
gist.impact: Users will experience consistent success rates when generating videos with Wan, eliminating previous timeout issues.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Robot on a film set, representing video generation. The scene implies professional/premium quality (direct routing).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee sitting in a director's chair while the chunky robot holds a clapperboard on a movie set. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Pixel text 'ACTION'. Cute and professional vibes.
